---
title: "Introduction to Thermal.thresholds"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{myutils}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

```{r, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  collapse = TRUE,
  comment = "#>"
)
```

```{r setup}
library(Thermal.thresholds)
```
# Introduction

This is a package used to estimate preferred and tolerable ocean temperature by pelagic fish species such as whale sharks.

# load the data

To use the whale shark data, execute:
```{r}
data(ws)
```

# run the fit_temp()
You can run this function with the whale shark data:
```{r}
fit_temp(ws,30)
```
